text: Good afternoon, Sarah. The generator is showing an intermittent voltage drop; I’d like to inspect the alternator brushes tomorrow.
Afternoon. That sounds good. Do you think the boat should be left on shore power during the inspection?
Yes, keep it on shore power so we can test the generator under load and monitor the voltage behavior safely.
I’ll arrange shore power for the morning and make sure the batteries are fully charged before you arrive.
Perfect. If the brushes are worn, we’ll replace them and verify the output under 120V load.
Great, I’ll confirm the appointment and send you the dock location.
